1.description: retrieve Trondheim municipality geometry for spatial filtering

2.description: inspect distinct risk classes to identify 'high risk' class value

3.description: retrieve quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class, filtered by Trondheim municipality extent

5.description: identify buildings intersecting high-risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: compute centroid of Trondheim municipality geometry

7.description: calculate distance from each intersecting building to municipality centroid

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance

9.description: sort buildings by distance to centroid ascending, with building ID as tie-breaker

8.description: collapse to one row per building with minimum distance
